items.name: VS Code
items.desc: My primary editor for everything from Flutter to Python. Stripped down with minimal extensions.

items.name: Theme: GitHub Dark Default
items.desc: Clean, high-contrast, and easy on the eyes during late-night coding sessions.

items.name: Font: Wumpus Mono / Montserrat / Source Code Pro
items.desc: Wumpus Mono for body text, Montserrat bold for headings, and Source Code Pro for code and UI labels on this site.

items.name: Figma
items.desc: Where every project starts. I use it for wireframing, UI design, and prototyping.
